# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| latest  | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Use GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/omniproc/fwrqst/security/advisories/new) to submit a report. You will receive a response within 72 hours.

Include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Impact assessment
- Suggested fix (if any)
